title: Ganesh mantra
intro: Read the Ganesh Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Ganesh.
description:
Om Gam Ganapataye Namaha॥
Om, I bow down to the Lord of the Ganas (Lord Ganesha). (This mantra is a humble salutation to the one who removes all obstacles.)

faq.q1: When should Ganesh Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Ganesh Mantra is considered auspicious before starting any new work or during morning prayers.
faq.q2: How many times should Ganesh Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Ganesh Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Ganesh Mantra is believed to remove obstacles and bring wisdom and success.
faq.a4: Yes, students often chant Ganesh Mantra to seek wisdom, focus, and knowledge.
faq.q5: Can Ganesh Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, daily chanting of Ganesh Mantra is considered highly auspicious.
